items.intended_ui_layer: touch feedback overlay above interactable world/UI element; below modal/dialogue text layers
items.use: brief tap confirmation ripple centered on pressed target
items.opacity_recommendation: 45-70% peak alpha, animate scale up and fade over 0.18-0.28 seconds
items.nine_slice: not recommended; radial sprite should be uniformly scaled
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent Godot UI feedback sprite. Primary request: one centered tap ripple ring only, Apple-like translucent glass glow, soft cyan-white outer bloom, thin rounded circular ring, hollow transparent center, generous padding, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no icon, no button label, no background, no sheet, not marketing UI.

items.intended_ui_layer: world-space prompt aura behind inspect/look prompt icon or object highlight
items.use: soft glow plate behind a look/inspect prompt with no embedded text
items.opacity_recommendation: 25-45%, pulse subtly; keep below any icon/text
items.nine_slice: not recommended; preserve feathered oval falloff
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent Godot UI glow sprite. Primary request: one horizontal oval glow for a look prompt, Apple-like translucent frosted light, pale sky and mint edge bloom, empty transparent center area, no icon, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no white background, no rectangular sheet, generous padding.

items.intended_ui_layer: HUD action button base behind an interaction icon
items.use: round glass action button base; icon added separately in runtime proof
items.opacity_recommendation: 70-90% base alpha with 1px soft rim; hover/press can tint slightly warmer
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG button base. Primary request: one 96x96-style circular Apple-like glass button with frosted translucent material, soft rim highlight, subtle inner blur, no icon, no text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no white background, no rectangular plate, centered with clean padding.

items.intended_ui_layer: inventory grid slot background behind item icon
items.use: square-ish glass inventory slot base for proof inventory UI
items.opacity_recommendation: 65-85%; selected state can add separate glow instead of brightening whole tile
items.nine_slice: optional only if upscaled; recommended margins [24, 24, 24, 24]
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG inventory slot base. Primary request: one rounded-square Apple-like translucent glass inventory slot, quiet frosted panel, soft bevel, small specular highlight, empty center, no object, no icon, no text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no white background, clean transparent corners.

items.intended_ui_layer: dialogue container background below dialogue text and portrait/status overlays
items.use: wide child-friendly glass dialogue bubble with text rendered separately
items.opacity_recommendation: 80-92% panel alpha; text area should receive a runtime contrast scrim if needed
items.nine_slice: recommended margins [54, 54, 46, 42], tail should not be stretched if used
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG dialogue bubble background. Primary request: one wide rounded Apple-like translucent glass dialogue bubble, soft frosted white-blue material, gentle rim, subtle lower tail nub without direction arrow, empty clean center, no text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no character, no marketing sheet, transparent outside corners.

items.intended_ui_layer: world-space shadow/highlight below selected character, prop, or UI card
items.opacity_recommendation: 22-38%; multiply/tint in runtime if used over bright terrain
items.nine_slice: not recommended; oval falloff should scale uniformly or non-uniformly as a sprite
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG soft shadow. Primary request: one soft horizontal oval selection shadow, translucent cool gray with slight blue rim, very feathered edges, no hard outline, no text, no letters, no numbers, no icon, no object, no background, lots of transparent padding.

items.intended_ui_layer: reward feedback overlay near currency counter or pickup location
items.use: coin gain sparkle burst without coin symbol/text
items.opacity_recommendation: 60-90% for first frame; animate upward drift and fade
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG reward feedback sprite. Primary request: small warm golden sparkle burst for coin gain feedback, Apple-like glossy translucent glints, several tiny star flecks and soft halos, no coin drawing, no currency symbol, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no background, centered with padding.

items.intended_ui_layer: relationship feedback overlay above NPC or friendship meter
items.use: friendship affection glow cue with no numeric value
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG friendship feedback sprite. Primary request: one soft heart-shaped glow, Apple-like translucent pink glass, gentle warm rim, subtle inner bloom, no face, no icon details, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no background, centered with generous transparent padding.

items.intended_ui_layer: small badge base for A-Z anchor state indicator; letter/content rendered separately
items.use: soft badge backing for memory-palace anchor indicator, without embedded letter
items.opacity_recommendation: 70-88%; add separate runtime glyph/icon only after accessibility contrast pass
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG badge base. Primary request: one small rounded badge base for an anchor indicator, Apple-like translucent glass, pale aqua and warm highlight, empty center, no anchor symbol, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no icon, no background, clean transparent corners.

items.intended_ui_layer: footer command button background below separate icon/text
items.use: wide glass footer button base for proof navigation/action UI
items.opacity_recommendation: 75-90%; keep text/icon separate and add runtime contrast layer if needed
items.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: transparent PNG wide button base. Primary request: one wide rounded pill Apple-like translucent glass footer button, frosted panel, subtle rim highlight and soft shadow, empty center, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no icon, no logo, no white background, no marketing UI sheet, transparent outside corners.
